programme.title: Quo Vadis TV
programme.desc: Quo Vadis TV is committed to sharing the Biblical message in a way that makes Christian living practical, realistic, and attainable. Our theme is summarized the question: "where are you going?" Our Aim with this inquiry is to help people find orientation and find the path back to God.

Our theme is summarized the question: "where are you going?" Our Aim with this inquiry is to help people find orientation and find the path back to God.

programme.title: DW News
programme.desc: DW News is news and information channel from a German international broadcaster Deutsche Well (German Wall). It provides latest news from Europe and all around the world in several languages on a daily basis. The service is transmitted worldwide via satellite with a reach of more than 197 million people on a weekly basis. Their motto is Made for minds. DW news is informative, entertaining, up-to-date and what is even more important, reliable source of news, the content is intended to be independent of government influence.

programme.title: Eco-at-India
programme.desc: Consumption of goods by people is drastically influencing environment. Eco India is a DW program entirely dedicated to Indian subcontinent and it looks at possibilities to strike a balance, and make consumption more sustainable, in such way to avoid point of no return.

programme.title: DW News
programme.desc: DW News is news and information channel from a German international broadcaster Deutsche Well (German Wall). It provides latest news from Europe and all around the world in several languages on a daily basis. The service is transmitted worldwide via satellite with a reach of more than 197 million people on a weekly basis. Their motto is Made for minds. programme.title: Made in Germany
programme.desc: Featuring analysis from experts and interviews with aspiring entrepreneurs, Made in Germany explores the diverse business sector in Germany, revealing how Europe's strongest economy affects business across the world. The team of determined reporters travel across Germany and Europe to meet individuals driving the economy and changing the way we work. We focus on the impact technology is having on business, company ethics and practices and the social issues across the country's workforce. These stories and experiences shine a light on how global business is changing.

programme.title: Close up

programme.desc: Espacio de Deutsche Welle que ofrece una selección de los mejores documentales y reportajes de actualidad sobre los acontecimientos más importantes del mundo político, empresarial, económico, deportivo o científico, entre muchos otros.

programme.title: Best of DW-online Content

programme.title: The 77 Percent
programme.desc: 77 per cent of Africa's population are below the age of thirty-five yet their interests are under-represented poltically and economically. This show aims to redress the balance by providing a voice to the largest demographic group on the continent. These dynamic younger people are politically engaged and will determine the future path their countries, and the continent as a whole, will follow in the twenty-first century. Presented by Eddy Micah Jr. from Ghana and Wanjiku Mwaura from Kenya, the show promotes a pan-African agenda by encouraging dialogue between the various interested parties. The show pulls no punches when delivering its compelling reports, personal accounts and provocative discussions. A long overdue look at the big issues that affect the youth of Africa.

The team of determined reporters travel across Germany and Europe to meet individuals driving the economy and changing the way we work. We focus on the impact technology is having on business, company ethics and practices and the social issues across the country's workforce. These stories and experiences shine a light on how global business is changing.

programme.title: DW News
programme.desc: DW News is news and information channel from a German international broadcaster Deutsche Well (German Wall). It provides latest news from Europe and all around the world in several languages on a daily basis. The service is transmitted worldwide via satellite with a reach of more than 197 million people on a weekly basis. Their motto is Made for minds. DW news is informative, entertaining, up-to-date and what is even more important, reliable source of news, the content is intended to be independent of government influence.

programme.title: Sports Life
programme.desc: Donjeta Sadiku is a supremely talented boxer with multiple titles to her name. But there is a problem: Donjeta comes from Kosovo, a state whose sovereignty many other countries refuse to recognize. That means she can't compete everywhere, which is impacting her international career. Donjeta doesn't only face opposition in the ring, but also outside of it due to politics.

programme.title: Made in Germany
programme.desc: Featuring analysis from experts and interviews with aspiring entrepreneurs, Made in Germany explores the diverse business sector in Germany, revealing how Europe's strongest economy affects business across the world. The team of determined reporters travel across Germany and Europe to meet individuals driving the economy and changing the way we work.

programme.title: DW News
programme.desc: DW News is news and information channel from a German international broadcaster Deutsche Well (German Wall). It provides latest news from Europe and all around the world in several languages on a daily basis. programme.title: Eco Africa
programme.desc: Eco Africa highlights the innovative and inspiring projects from across Africa and Europe that are being put into practice in a a bid to tackle climate change and support our depleting environments. In Africa especially, huge numbers of animal and wildlife species have dramatically fallen, largely due to a vast increase in human population across the continent. The increasing population is taking over vast swathes of natural land and in turn, adding to the demand for natural resources. This series explores the different concepts being used to help sustain our future, such as alternative resources, biodiversity conservation and the future of travel.

programme.title: The 77 Percent
programme.desc: In this week's show, we explore the complex issue of tribalism. We travel to Kenya to meet a couple whose love defies societal norms. Our resident rapper, Killa Ace, shares his heartbreak after being prohibited from marrying the woman he loves due to their different tribes. In our Street Debate, we hear from Nigerian youths who are breaking free from tribalism.

It provides latest news from Europe and all around the world in several languages on a daily basis. The service is transmitted worldwide via satellite with a reach of more than 197 million people on a weekly basis. Their motto is Made for minds. DW news is informative, entertaining, up-to-date and what is even more important, reliable source of news, the content is intended to be independent of government influence.

programme.title: Men, Muscles, and the Pursuit of the "Perfect Body"
programme.desc: Until recently, the use of anabolic steroids was the privilege of elite athletes. But the use of performance-enhancing drugs among young men has now reached alarming proportions.

programme.title: In Good Shape
programme.desc: In Good Shape is the weekly health show on DW, entirely dedicated to health care. Find out everything about new medical treatments, alternative medicine, wellness, fitness, and nutrition. The show's hosts and guests discuss key topics with specialists, and offer opportunities to receive tips and tools for a healthy lifestyle directly from experts. Learn how natural remedies can help you stay healthier, how you can maintain a healthy diet, how to manage stress and how to improve your quality of life.

programme.title: The 77 Percent
programme.desc: In this week's show, we explore the complex issue of tribalism. We travel to Kenya to meet a couple whose love defies societal norms. programme.title: Sports Life
programme.desc: Donjeta Sadiku is a supremely talented boxer with multiple titles to her name. programme.desc: The Turkish human rights activist and arts patron Osman Kavala has been in prison since 2017. The philanthropist, who campaigns for democracy and the rule of law in Turkey, is regarded as a public enemy by the Erdogan government.

programme.title: Eco Africa
programme.desc: Eco Africa highlights the innovative and inspiring projects from across Africa and Europe that are being put into practice in a a bid to tackle climate change and support our depleting environments. In Africa especially, huge numbers of animal and wildlife species have dramatically fallen, largely due to a vast increase in human population across the continent. The increasing population is taking over vast swathes of natural land and in turn, adding to the demand for natural resources. This series explores the different concepts being used to help sustain our future, such as alternative resources, biodiversity conservation and the future of travel.

programme.title: Nigeria's Mysterious Art Treasures
programme.desc: The first major city in sub-Saharan Africa was founded in what is now Nigeria. Ilé-Ifè, the sacred city of the Yoruba, was a center of African civilization. Until its decline.

programme.title: DW News
programme.desc: DW News is news and information channel from a German international broadcaster Deutsche Well (German Wall). It provides latest news from Europe and all around the world in several languages on a daily basis. The service is transmitted worldwide via satellite with a reach of more than 197 million people on a weekly basis. Their motto is Made for minds. DW news is informative, entertaining, up-to-date and what is even more important, reliable source of news, the content is intended to be independent of government influence.

programme.title: The Day the Earth Stood Still
programme.desc: Klaatu and his guardian robot, Gort, come from afar to warn Earth about nuclear war.

programme.title: Conquest of Space
programme.desc: A captain (Walter Brooke), his son (Eric Fleming), a sergeant (Mickey Shaughnessy) and crew take off from a space station in a rocket ship for Mars.

programme.title: Deputy Marshal
programme.desc: A lawman (Jon Hall) tracks bank robbers to Wyoming and gets wind of a railroad-land scam.

programme.title: Dallas
programme.desc: An ex-Confederate officer (Gary Cooper) poses as a U.S. marshal in Dallas to track three brothers for attacking his home.

programme.title: Gunfighters
programme.desc: A gunfighter (Randolph Scott) turns cowhand and then back again, fighting a cattle baron with two daughters (Barbara Britton, Dorothy Hart).

programme.title: They Rode West
programme.desc: Dr. Allen Seward (Robert Francis) is the new doctor at a remote Army outpost. His liberal attitudes towards Native Americans become a source of tension between him and his superiors, especially Capt. Peter Blake (Philip Carey), who regards all Native Americans as dangerous and untrustworthy. Seward's insistence on treating several local Kiowa tribespeople for malaria further enrages Blake, who deems Seward a traitor when the Kiowa join forces with the Comanches and attack the fort.

programme.title: Ball of Fire
programme.desc: Hoping to update his chapter on modern slang, encyclopedia writer Professor Bertram Potts (Gary Cooper) ventures into a chic nightclub. Inside, he meets the snarky burlesque performer "Sugarpuss" O'Shea (Barbara Stanwyck). Fascinated by her command of popular jargon, Potts invites her to stay with him. But, unknown to Potts, she is the fiancée of a mobster (Dana Andrews) and wanted by the police. In the ensuing mayhem, Potts must stay on his toes or be swallowed up by bigger fish.

programme.title: Sergeant Rutledge
programme.desc: At a U.S. Army fort in the Arizona Territory in 1881, an officer is murdered, and his beautiful young daughter is beaten, raped and strangled. Army lawyer Tom Cantrell (Jeffrey Hunter) defends the accused, African-American sergeant Braxton Rutledge (Woody Strode), a soldier who had once been under his command. Under questioning by Cantrell and the prosecutor (Carleton Young), multiple witnesses piece together the truth of what happened at the fort that day.

programme.title: Breaker Morant
programme.desc: In South Africa during the Second Boer War, Australian Army Lieutenants Harry "Breaker" Morant (Edward Woodward), Peter Handcock (Bryan Brown) and George Witton (Lewis Fitz-Gerald) stand accused of the murders of six Boer prisoners and the assassination of a German missionary. British Commander-in-Chief Lord Kitchener is determined to see the men found guilty, which he can use as a bargaining chip in an impending peace conference with the Boers.

programme.title: The Adventures of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Holmes links a murder in a quiet English house to a Chicago gangster.

programme.title: Paid Programming
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: The Gay Cavalier
programme.desc: The Cisco Kid (Gilbert Roland) and Pancho (Martin Garralaga) try to help an unhappy bride.

programme.title: Through the Bible With Les Feldick
programme.desc: Les Feldick, an Oklahoma farmer and rancher with a special gift for teaching the Bible; his simple and nondenominational approach on the program "Through the Bible with Les Feldick" has reached millions around the world with the Gospel of Grace.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Earp rides into Santa Fe, N.M., to stop a war between two families vying for control of the land, the Finneys and the Grangers; the local sheriff backs the duplicitous Finneys, who created fake land deeds, but Earp finds the real deeds.

programme.title: Paid Programming
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Paid Programming
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Ball of Fire

programme.title: Seven Angry Men
programme.desc: Abolitionist John Brown's (Raymond Massey) fight against slavery ends with his 1859 arsenal raid at Harpers Ferry.

programme.title: Sergeant Rutledge
programme.desc: At a U.S. Army fort in the Arizona Territory in 1881, an officer is murdered, and his beautiful young daughter is beaten, raped and strangled. Army lawyer Tom Cantrell (Jeffrey Hunter) defends the accused, African-American sergeant Braxton Rutledge (Woody Strode), a soldier who had once been under his command. programme.title: They Rode West
programme.desc: Dr. Allen Seward (Robert Francis) is the new doctor at a remote Army outpost. His liberal attitudes towards Native Americans become a source of tension between him and his superiors, especially Capt. Peter Blake (Philip Carey), who regards all Native Americans as dangerous and untrustworthy. Seward's insistence on treating several local Kiowa tribespeople for malaria further enrages Blake, who deems Seward a traitor when the Kiowa join forces with the Comanches and attack the fort.

programme.title: Good Day for a Hanging
programme.desc: When the local sheriff is killed after a bank robbery, ex-lawman Ben Cutler (Fred MacMurray) collars the apparent killer, Eddie Campbell (Robert Vaughn). Because of his background as a local youth who spent time living with the Cutlers, Eddie gets the benefit of the doubt from Ben's daughter and his wife-to-be, Ruth (Margaret Hayes). Ben is firm in his belief that Eddie is guilty, and as the matter is debated in a divisive court battle, it will soon become clear whether he's right.

programme.title: The Hasty Heart
programme.desc: On the last day of World War II, Scottish soldier Lachlan MacLachlan is shot in the lower back and needs to be treated at the local medical unit in Burma before he can return home. His stay is lengthened, however, and when his nurse asks why, she learns that his wound is fatal. With the help of an American patient, the staff and other patients at the hospital try to make the Scot's final days happy. But things get ugly when he learns the truth.

programme.title: Wagon Master

programme.title: Heaven With a Gun
programme.desc: Jim Killian arrives in a small Arizona town hoping to establish a peaceful life as the local preacher, but he soon finds himself in the middle of a feud between sheep ranchers and cattlemen. Leloopa, a young Native American woman, pleads for Killian's help after her shepherd father is hanged by Coke Beck, the vicious son of the head cattle rancher. Killian must weigh his actions carefully lest he perpetuate the cycle of retribution and revenge.

Because of his background as a local youth who spent time living with the Cutlers, Eddie gets the benefit of the doubt from Ben's daughter and his wife-to-be, Ruth (Margaret Hayes). programme.title: 7th Cavalry

So when an order to retrieve the bodies from the battlefield arrives, Benson volunteers for the dangerous mission of returning into Indian territory.

Devlin (Randolph Scott) and his cavalry pals Maitland (James Garner) and Clegg (Gordon Jones) travel to Devlin's brother's home, but arrive to see the place overrun by American Indians. programme.title: The Howards of Virginia

programme.title: Gunfighters

When Brazos takes the body to the nearby ranch of the powerful Banner (Griff Barnett), the rancher accuses him of the murder. Brazos leaves Banner's daughter, Bess (Barbara Britton), a vital piece of evidence in the crime, and then must evade Banner and a crooked sheriff as he reluctantly takes up arms to prove his innocence.

programme.title: Forbidden Planet
programme.desc: In this sci-fi classic, a spacecraft travels to the distant planet Altair IV to discover the fate of a group of scientists sent there decades earlier. When Commander John J. Adams and his crew arrive, they discover only two people: Dr. Morbius and his daughter, Altaira, who was born on the remote planet. Soon, Adams begins to uncover the mystery of what happened on Altair IV, and why Morbius and Altaira are the sole survivors.

programme.desc: S02 E21 The Spoiler An elderly couple moves to North Fork under an assumed name to hide the fact that they are the parents of a vicious killer; the plan backfires when the son shows up at their home.

programme.title: Ultimate Cowboy Showdown
programme.desc: S01 E01 The Ultimate Cowboy Twelve cowboys from all over the United States move onto a cattle ranch, where fast friendships are formed and battle lines quickly drawn; Trace Adkins puts the cowboys to the test in a team challenge that will determine who stays and who goes home.

programme.title: Ultimate Cowboy Showdown
programme.desc: S01 E02 The Weakest Link The remaining 10 cowboys show off their skills in a timed calf-roping challenge; later, a team challenge reveals that some of the contestants lack the experience needed to compete at this level; one cowboy's antics lead to an angry confrontation.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S04 E30 Milly's Brother A gambler moves into North Fork and begins courting a local girl.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S04 E31 Outlaw Shoes Lucas develops temporary amnesia while visiting a strange town.

programme.title: F Troop
programme.desc: S02 E07 Yellow Bird O'Rourke and Agarn ransom an heiress (Julie Newmar) after American Indians kidnap her.

programme.title: F Troop
programme.desc: S02 E08 The Ballot of Corporal Agarn Agarn's vote will decide an election, and O'Rourke schemes to make it pay off handsomely.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: S05 E02 Heck Thomas Risks It All After his wife leaves him, Deputy Marshal Heck Thomas throws himself into his work, hunting a gang of deadly bootleggers without regard for his own safety; when he falls in love with a kind schoolteacher, Thomas suddenly has a lot more to lose.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: S05 E05 Marshal Garfias Faces the Mob As a deputy in Phoenix, Enrique Garfias witnesses the lynching of prisoners by vigilantes; when he is later elected as the town's first marshal, he has a chance at redemption when he attempts to defend a gang of criminals from yet another angry mob.

programme.title: Into the Wild Frontier
programme.desc: S03 E02 William Bartram: America's First Great Naturalist Naturalist William Bartram explores the unmapped regions of the South to document the native fauna and flora; after surviving many encounters with Native Americans and wildlife, it's an invisible virus that may finally end the journey and his life.

programme.title: The Tall Tales of Jim Bridger
programme.desc: S01 E03 Fool's Gold Jim Bridger and his fellow trappers believe they are near El Dorado, the mythical Spanish city of gold, when they discover a river filled with gold, but their insatiable greed turns friends into enemies and puts Bridger at risk of a gruesome fate.

programme.title: The Tall Tales of Jim Bridger

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: S05 E03 Jesse James' Final Raid Famous outlaw Jesse James convinces the James-Younger Gang to attempt its riskiest heist yet, a daring bank robbery in Northfield, Minnesota; their well-laid plans are thwarted by sharp-eyed citizens intent on protecting their hard-earned money.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: S01 E02 The Bandit Queen The true tale of Pearl Hart, the notorious "Bandit Queen"; with no money to care for her gravely ill mother, Pearl makes a fateful decision to enter a life of crime and soon becomes the first woman to rob a stagecoach in the Old West.

programme.title: Into the Wild Frontier
programme.desc: S03 E03 Daniel Boone: Cunning Woodsman Frontiersman Daniel Boone faces the biggest challenge of his life when the Shawnee take him prisoner; he must find a way to escape and travel 160 miles through hostile territory to warn Boonesborough, and his family, of a looming attack.

programme.title: The Tall Tales of Jim Bridger

programme.title: Psych
programme.desc: Shawn and Gus investigate a murder during the re-enactment of a Civil War battle.

programme.title: The Rockford Files
programme.desc: A former convict hires Rockford to find his girlfriend (Mary Frann), but actually he wants pearls she possesses.

programme.title: The Rockford Files
programme.desc: Rockford is caught between police and gangsters when he helps a former fiancée (Linda Evans); guest Jackie Cooper.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: A puzzled Walker sets out to learn why a statue looks to be shedding real tears and discovers the source of a new drug called "white buffalo."

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Trivette's friend turns up dead, and the Rangers must go undercover to expose the truth about the syndicate responsible for his death.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: While the Rangers search for a baby's mother, Alex and Walker take responsibility for the youth and realize they want a child of their own.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Walker races to find a hijacked ambulance that holds the donor liver needed to save the life of Faith, a young genetic liver disorder victim.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Walker champions the cause of a young boxer being pulled into a life of crime; the Rangers discover an Ecstasy drug ring that has been preying on teenagers.

programme.title: Monk
programme.desc: Despite supposedly being dead for six years, a kung fu movie star is implicated in the murder of the author of a controversial tell-all biography.

programme.title: Monk
programme.desc: After Monk witnesses a Chinese mob killing, he goes into protective custody and is taken to a remote cabin in the woods, where he uncovers another murder.

programme.title: Monk
programme.desc: Monk must deal with being in a traffic jam, caused by a car, containing a corpse, abandoned in the middle of the road.

programme.title: House
programme.desc: Dr. House's approach raises questions when he treats a nun for what he believes to be an allergy, not realizing that her past is coming back to haunt her.

programme.title: House
programme.desc: Dr. House shows special interest in a schizophrenic with deep-vein thrombosis and her teenage son, who is her primary caregiver.

programme.title: Fear Files
programme.desc: Dramatization of various mysterious stories that border on the supernatural. These unexplainable events include possession and exploration of haunted places. (Horror)

programme.title: Psych
programme.desc: Shawn, Gus and members of Gus' a cappella group investigate the shooting of a youth program founder.

programme.title: Psych
programme.desc: Shawn and Gus search for a body's cause of death to save Woody from being fired for making a mistake.

programme.title: Franklin & Bash
programme.desc: Peter represents an old acquaintance of Jared's in a legal dilemma; Karp and Hanna's history prevents them from working together on a divorce case.

programme.title: Community
programme.desc: Annie invites Professor Cornwallis to Jeff's holiday party in the hope of getting on his good side; when the friends learn Cornwallis intends to give them a bad grade, they decide to take decisive action.

programme.title: Community
programme.desc: Annie and Shirley try to bring Leonard down; Troy and Abed re-enact a scene from a body switching film.

programme.title: Community
programme.desc: Convinced that the study group was destined to meet, Abed pieces together everyone's past -- revealing that their lives have always been intertwined; Chang tries to destroy Greendale once and for all.

programme.title: Community
programme.desc: With enough credits to graduate, Jeff contemplates his future; the study group once again is faced with the darkest timeline.

programme.title: Happy Endings
programme.desc: When Brad and Max work together at a bar mitzvah, Max is jealous of Brad's performance; Dave and Alex's attempts at romantic gestures don't go as planned.

programme.title: Happy Endings
programme.desc: Dave decides to give his friends an authentic Navajo Thanksgiving; Max finds a copy of the lost season of "The Real World" he was on with Brad; the gang remembers how they all met.

programme.title: Quantum Leap
programme.desc: Sam becomes a star singer in a glitter rock band who is stalked by an obsessed fan; guest Peter Noone.

programme.title: CSN Mint - America 250 Coin Roll Collection!
programme.desc: CSN Mint presents 1776-2026 U.S. Mint coin roll offers honoring America's 250th Anniversary, including the Emerging Liberty Dime, Enduring Liberty Half Dollar, and P&D Quarter Roll Continuity.

programme.title: Paid Programming
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Elevation with Steven Furtick
programme.desc: Elevation with Steven Furtick focuses on the strength of God in our everyday struggles. This message is called "Cutting Room - Part 1".

programme.title: Joseph Prince
programme.desc: Joseph Prince is a leading voice in proclaiming the gospel around the world through his ministry.

programme.title: Through the Bible With Les Feldick
programme.desc: Les Feldick, an Oklahoma farmer and rancher with a special gift for teaching the Bible; his simple and nondenominational approach on the program "Through the Bible with Les Feldick" has reached millions around the world with the Gospel of Grace.

programme.title: Discovering the Jewish Jesus With Rabbi Kirt Schneider
programme.desc: Messianic Rabbi Kirt Schneider, a Jewish believer in Jesus, shares his insights into the Old and New Testaments, provides guidance on prayer and delivers the Word of God.

programme.title: Psych
programme.desc: The murder of a psychiatrist leads Shawn and Gus to a man who claims a ghost is trying to kill him.

programme.title: Psych
programme.desc: Gus and Shawn spend a weekend searching for a missing teen at a comic-book and sci-fi convention.

programme.title: The Rockford Files
programme.desc: Police and the mob seek a model (Pamela Hensley) connected with murder, until a dentist identifies her corpse.

programme.title: The Rockford Files
programme.desc: Rockford's former cellmate (Tony Musante) is accused of murdering his wealthy wife; guest Diana Muldaur.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: A senator pleads with Walker to head up a new task force to bring a criminal mastermind, accused of hacking into federal law enforcement computers, to justice.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: "The Chairman" continues his reign of terror against undercover federal agents, eluding a frustrated Walker at every turn.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: The chairman sees the small links in his chain of command begin to break as Walker gets closer to putting an end to his criminal reign.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: "The Chairman" kidnaps Alex, forcing a showdown with Walker, who has been building a convincing case against the criminal mastermind.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Dangerous escaped convicts go on a crime spree, knocking over banks throughout Texas, and Walker is hot on their trail.

programme.title: Monk

programme.title: Stacey David's GearZ
programme.desc: Stacey digs into the unique history of how a WWII vehicle became the first mass-produced, civilian 4x4 truck. Next, he upgrades the electrical and fuel systems on a '49 Power Wagon, so you can drive it safely.

programme.title: Sam's Garage
programme.desc: Former "Shadetree Mechanic" and "Two Guys Garage" host Sam Memmolo, a pioneer in automotive how-to TV, is back turning wrenches and tightening bolts on "Sam's Garage." Memmolo helped develop the concept of step-by-step instructions to help advise viewers of the latest products and techniques for repairing and improving a wide variety of rides, a legacy that continues on his latest series. With vast automotive knowledge in the garage and in the studio, Memmolo is as entertaining as he is experienced. Sam Mahdavi also hosts.

programme.title: Petrolicious - Soul Made
programme.desc: For Rob, it's all about the challenge - trimming the cars other people wouldn't touch.

programme.title: Petrolicious - Soul Made
programme.desc: In a quiet corner of Milan, Pino and Milena La Rosa shape more than cars—they preserve philosophy. Lab Eleven isn't chasing trends; it's refining essence. From accident-free 993s to thoughtful, soulful builds, the focus is purity. No gimmicks, no theater. Just 911s, reborn with intention, balance, and an insistence that perfection lives not in polish—but in purpose.

programme.title: Petrolicious - Soul Made
programme.desc: Through fine art photography rooted in precision and restraint, Thornton reveals the true shape of automotive design. Known for his background in high stakes commercial photography, his work strips away distraction and focuses on light, proportion, and intent.

programme.title: My Classic Car
programme.desc: Host Dennis Gage upholds his "honor the timeless classics" catchphrase in this series, as he travels across North America to visit prestigious auto shows and events, spotlighting everything from muscle cars to museum pieces. The handlebar mustachioed Gage takes viewers along for the ride and keeps it entertaining with his unique perspective and enthusiasm for all things automotive.

programme.title: 3:10 to Yuma
programme.desc: (1957) Classic western with Glenn Ford and Van Heflin. The capture of a murderous stagecoach robber propels an impoverished local rancher on a perilous journey. Directed by Delmer Daves.

programme.title: Leave Her to Heaven
programme.desc: (1945) Riveting film noir melodrama starring Oscar-nominated Gene Tierney as an irredeemably evil, possessive woman who resorts to murder to keep her husband (Cornel Wilde) with her.

programme.title: One Day
programme.desc: (2011) Romantic drama. Jim Sturgess and Anne Hathaway star as friends whose lives intertwine and diverge over the years, after first meeting as graduates in 1988.

programme.title: Commando
programme.desc: (1985) Thriller starring Arnold Schwarzenegger. To free his kidnapped daughter, an ex US commando must agree to assassinate a South American president. But he's not as pliant as he seems...

programme.title: Predator
programme.desc: (1987) Sci-fi thriller starring Arnold Schwarzenegger. A US commando unit gets trapped in the jungle by a murderous, seemingly invincible alien hunter. But they ain't got time to bleed.

programme.title: Late Night Shopping
programme.desc: (2001) British Connections. Saul Metzstein's romantic comedy, in which four friends set off into the night to save the life of a woman one of them has dumped. Strong language.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: The Long Ships
programme.desc: (1964) Adventure with Richard Widmark as a Viking who leads his men on the quest for a huge bell made of solid gold, but with Sidney Poitier, leader of an army of Moors, on the trail too.

programme.title: D-Day the Sixth of June
programme.desc: (1956) Wartime romance set against the background of the D-Day landings, starring Robert Taylor and Dana Wynter. A married American officer embarks on an affair with English nurse.

programme.title: Hombre
programme.desc: (1967) Paul Newman stars in this powerful western as a white man, brought up by Apaches, who reluctantly defends a stagecoach against a band of outlaws. With Richard Boone.

programme.title: Le Mans '66
programme.desc: (2019) Oscar-winning sports drama starring Matt Damon and Christian Bale. In the 60s, Ford set out to build a car that can defeat Ferrari at the 24 Hours of Le Mans race.

programme.title: Plane
programme.desc: (2023) Action thriller starring Gerard Butler as an airline pilot who becomes a one-man army after crash landing on an island overrun by bad guys. To survive, he's gonna have to wing it.

programme.title: Memento
programme.desc: (2000) Christopher Nolan's Oscar-nominated thriller with Guy Pearce. A man tracking his wife's killer has no short-term memory so must find other ways to piece together the evidence.

programme.title: Some Voices
programme.desc: (2000) Drama starring Daniel Craig, Kelly Macdonald and David Morrissey. Ray is released from psychiatric hospital into his brother's care, but struggles to adjust to life.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Howards End
programme.desc: (1992) Anthony Hopkins, Helena Bonham Carter and Emma Thompson star in James Ivory's adaptation of EM Forster's novel about two families, love, treachery and revenge.

programme.title: Tora! Tora! Tora!
programme.desc: (1970) Oscar-winning drama portraying the bombing of Pearl Harbor, from both American and Japanese perspectives. With Joseph Cotten and So Yamamura.

programme.title: Tolkien
programme.desc: (2019) Biographical drama starring Nicholas Hoult and Lily Collins, charting the early life and inspirations of Lord of the Rings and The Hobbit author JRR Tolkien.

programme.title: Fisherman's Friends
programme.desc: (2019) Heart-warming comedy based on the real-life story of the Cornish folk ensemble who took the UK charts by storm in 2010, starring Daniel Mays and Tuppence Middleton.

programme.title: Morbius
programme.desc: (2022) Dark Marvel superhero fantasy with Jared Leto and Matt Smith. A science genius turns himself and his mate into vampires. But his mate's a naughty one and must be neutralised.

programme.title: X
programme.desc: (2022) Ti West's acclaimed grindhouse horror with Mia Goth. Some adult filmmakers inexplicably choose a ramshackle house in the Bible-Belt wilderness to shoot a film. It's gonna get nasty.

programme.title: Pig
programme.desc: (2021) Thriller. Nicolas Cage delivers a subtle turn in Michael Sarnoski's debut, an intriguing tale of an off-the-grid truffle hunter who returns to the city to rescue his kidnapped pig.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Wonder Park
programme.desc: (2019) Animated adventure featuring the voices of Jennifer Garner, Mila Kunis, John Oliver and Matthew Broderick. A girl's imaginary theme park comes to life when her mum goes to hospital.

programme.title: The Art of Racing in the Rain
programme.desc: (2019) Touching comedy-drama. An ageing golden retriever (voiced by Kevin Costner) tells the story of his life with his best pal, a budding Formula 1 driver.

programme.title: Sea Wife
programme.desc: (1957) Offbeat melodrama starring Richard Burton (as an RAF officer), Joan Collins (as a nun), Basil Sydney and Cy Grant, who end up on a life raft together after their ship is torpedoed.

programme.title: Jason and the Argonauts
programme.desc: (1963) Classic interpretation of the Greek myth of Jason's quest to find the Golden Fleece, boasting the enduring work of special effects maestro Ray Harryhausen. Directed by Don Chaffey.

programme.title: Transformers: Rise of the Beasts
programme.desc: (2023) Seventh instalment in the frenetic sci-fi franchise. The Maximals - part animal, part robot - join the Autobots to battle against planet-munching Unicron and his Terrorcon cronies.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - Dead...
programme.desc: ...Reckoning: (2023) Tom Cruise returns as Ethan Hunt and jumps a motorbike off a mountain for real. There's some stuff about an all-powerful AI. But it's the thrills that we're here for!

programme.title: Zola
programme.desc: (2020) Dark comedy drama based on a viral Twitter thread. Dancer Zola (Taylour Paige) joins a road trip to Tampa, where she gets dragged too far into the sex work world. Adults only.

programme.title: Trance
programme.desc: (2013) Danny Boyle's thriller stars James McAvoy, Rosario Dawson and Vincent Cassel in a complex tale about hypnotism and a daring art heist gone wrong.

programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Fixed Bayonets!
programme.desc: (1951) Korean War drama about the stress of battle. Officers drop one by one as a US platoon fights a rearguard action, leaving one unwilling man (Richard Basehart) to take their place.

programme.title: Sword of Sherwood Forest
programme.desc: (1960) Adventure with Richard Greene, Peter Cushing and a young Oliver Reed. Can Robin Hood foil the villainous Sheriff of Nottingham's evil plan to murder the Archbishop of Canterbury?

programme.title: Robin and Marian
programme.desc: (1976) Touching romance starring Sean Connery and Audrey Hepburn. The ageing legend Robin Hood returns to Sherwood Forest and discovers that, while he was away, Marian has become an Abbess.

programme.title: Turner & Hooch
programme.desc: (1989) Comedy-thriller starring Tom Hanks. A cop investigates a murder to which there's just one witness: Hooch, a slobbering, beer-drinking French mastiff, who now needs 24/7 protection.

programme.title: Gemini Man
programme.desc: (2019) Will Smith stars in Ang Lee's action-thriller as both an over-the-hill hitman and the young clone of himself sent to take him out. With Clive Owen.

programme.title: White House Down
programme.desc: (2013) All-American action thriller starring Channing Tatum and Jamie Foxx. A Capitol police officer steps up to protect the President when the White House is compromised.

programme.title: The Dive
programme.desc: (2023) Maximilian Erlenwein's breath-holding underwater survival thriller about two sisters on a fateful diving expedition, starring Louisa Kause and Sophie Lowe.

programme.title: Anaïs in Love
programme.desc: (2021) Romcom with Anaïs Demoustier. A young woman can't seem to stay still or move on, as she seeks satisfaction through a variety of complicated relationships. Sex/nudity. In French/subs.
